description: The CT Cranium DICOM scan is loaded in InVesalius 3. Your goal is to create a specific 3D reconstruction project with organized metadata. Create a bone segmentation mask named 'Cranial Bone' and generate a 3D surface from it named 'Skull_Model' with the color set to Red. Save the project to '/home/ga/Documents/organized_project.inv3'. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
